# zorae.ai — Premium AI Domain Name for Sale

> A short, brandable, pronounceable 6-letter .ai domain name available for acquisition via secure escrow transfer.

## Key Details

- Domain: zorae.ai
- Length: 6 letters
- Extension: .ai (gold standard for artificial intelligence)
- Pronunciation: Zo-rye (two syllables, globally intuitive)
- Status: Available for purchase
- Transfer: Safe Escrow contract transfer
- History: Clean domain history, no penalties

## Why zorae.ai

- **Brandability**: Zorae is a coined name with no generic dictionary limitations — it can own any meaning you build
- **SEO Authority**: Clean history, easy to index, premium .ai TLD signal
- **AI-Native**: The .ai extension is the gold standard for artificial intelligence brands
- **Memorability**: Short 6-letter, dual-syllable structure with liquid phonetics

## Potential Use Cases

- AI agent platform or framework
- Generative AI creative suite
- Enterprise AI orchestration layer
- AI-powered personal assistant / copilot
- Machine learning / deep learning startup
- Robotics or automation brand
- AI research lab

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.zorae.ai) — Domain overview, stats, and acquisition desk
- [Submit Offer](https://www.zorae.ai#offer-desk) — Direct offer submission via secure form

## Contact

Submit an offer directly at https://www.zorae.ai or use the acquisition form on the page.
